inputs.label: Trip Duration
inputs.businessContext: Total duration of the trip in days. Based on typical travel planning standards.

inputs.label: Daily Budget
inputs.businessContext: Planned daily expenditure per person. Derived from travel industry benchmarks (e.g., per diem rates).

inputs.label: Number of Travelers
inputs.businessContext: Number of people on the trip. Standard input for group travel budgeting.

inputs.label: Accommodation Cost per Night
inputs.businessContext: Average cost per night for lodging. Based on hotel industry pricing.

inputs.label: Transport Cost (Total)
inputs.businessContext: Total cost for flights, trains, car rental, etc. Standard travel expense category.

inputs.label: Food Cost per Day
inputs.businessContext: Daily food and beverage expenses. Based on USDA or per diem guidelines.

inputs.label: Activity Cost per Day
inputs.businessContext: Daily cost for tours, entrance fees, etc. Common travel budget component.

inputs.label: Miscellaneous Cost per Day
inputs.businessContext: Daily incidental expenses (tips, souvenirs, etc.). Standard buffer in travel budgets.

inputs.label: Currency
inputs.businessContext: Currency for budget calculations. Supports major currencies for international travel.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Confidence in input data accuracy. Affects risk adjustment. Based on data quality standards (e.g., ISO 8000).

thresholds.totalBudgetVsPlanned: If totalBudget > 1.2 * (dailyBudget * tripDuration * numTravelers + transportCost) then warning: 'Budget exceeds planned by more than 20%'
thresholds.accommodationRatio: If accommodationCost > 0.5 * dailyBudget then warning: 'Accommodation cost exceeds 50% of daily budget'

hiddenLossDrivers: If accommodationCost > 0.5 * dailyBudget then 'High accommodation ratio'
If totalBudget > 1.2 * (dailyBudget * tripDuration * numTravelers + transportCost) then 'Budget overrun'
suggestedActions: Consider reducing accommodation cost or increasing daily budget
Look for package deals to lower transport cost
Adjust daily budget to match expected expenses
